checklist_items.title: Verify Governance Proposal Authentication
checklist_items.description: Verify that governance proposal submissions require signatures from the proposer's wallet.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Proposal submission does not require strong authentication.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication mechanisms for proposal submissions, such as requiring signatures from the proposer's wallet.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing signature verification logic in the governance contract.

checklist_items.title: Verify End-to-End Encryption and Signature Verification for Votes
checklist_items.description: Ensure votes are end-to-end encrypted and signature verified before recording.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no end-to-end encryption or signature verification for votes.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement end-to-end encryption and signature verification to ensure the integrity of votes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and testing demonstrating vote encryption and signature validation.

checklist_items.title: Verify Collateral Price Oracles and Validation Mechanisms
checklist_items.description: Implement robust collateral price oracles and validation mechanisms to prevent $HONEY minting with manipulated collateral.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: HoneyFactory does not have sufficient validation of collateral value.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust collateral price oracles and validation mechanisms.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation and testing reports showing the accuracy and reliability of the collateral price oracles. Code review of validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Consider Privacy-Enhancing Technologies for Collateral Details
checklist_items.description: Evaluate and implement privacy-enhancing technologies or off-chain storage to protect user collateral details.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Users value the privacy of their collateral holdings.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Consider using privacy-enhancing technologies or off-chain storage for collateral details.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Report on the feasibility and impact of implementing privacy-enhancing technologies for collateral details.

checklist_items.title: Implement DoS Prevention Measures in HoneyFactory
checklist_items.description: Implement rate limiting, transaction filtering, or other DoS prevention measures in the HoneyFactory contract.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The HoneyFactory does not have rate limiting or other DoS protection mechanisms in place.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting, transaction filtering, or other DoS prevention measures in the HoneyFactory contract.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing rate limiting and transaction filtering logic. Performance testing results under simulated DoS attacks.

checklist_items.title: Implement Origin Authentication for $BGT Burn Calls
checklist_items.description: Check for signature of original caller to verify origin of $BGT burn call.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: No user input to specify who is receiving $BERA.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Check for signature of original caller.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing signature verification logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement Input Validation and Sanitization on BeraHub for $BGT Boosting
checklist_items.description: Verify the amount of $BGT used for boosting a validator.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BeraHub component does not have input sanitization for the $BGT amount.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input validation and sanitization on the BeraHub component to verify the amount of $BGT used for boosting.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and testing demonstrating proper input validation and sanitization.

checklist_items.title: Implement Origin Authentication for $BGT Boost Transactions on BeraHub
checklist_items.description: Use signatures to verify the origin of $BGT being used to boost a validator.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system does not properly authenticate the origin of the $BGT being used to boost a validator.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement origin authentication for $BGT boost transactions on the BeraHub component. Use signatures to verify the origin.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing signature verification logic for boost transactions.

checklist_items.title: Implement Rate Limiting on BeraHub for Boost Validator Functionality
checklist_items.description: Prevent users from spamming the boost validator functionality.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There are no rate limits on the number of boost transactions a user can send.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting on the BeraHub component to prevent users from spamming the boost validator functionality.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review showing rate limiting implementation. Performance testing results.

checklist_items.title: Implement Robust Validator Key Management and Intrusion Detection Systems
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit Reward Vault selection logic to prevent malicious $BGT emission.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust validator key management and intrusion detection systems. Regularly audit Reward Vault selection logic.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documented key management procedures and intrusion detection system logs. Audit reports of Reward Vault selection logic.

checklist_items.title: Implement Monitoring and Automated Mechanisms for $BGT Emissions
checklist_items.description: Reassign $BGT emissions if a validator is non-responsive.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validator intentionally or unintentionally stops directing $BGT emissions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement monitoring for validator activity and automated mechanisms to reassign $BGT emissions if a validator is non-responsive.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards showing validator activity and automated reassignment mechanisms.

checklist_items.title: Strengthen Validator Key Management and Prevent Unauthorized Validator Actions
checklist_items.description: Implement multi-factor authentication. Implement on-chain checks to prevent unauthorized validator actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The validator key management is weak, leading to unauthorized use.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Strengthen validator key management and multi-factor authentication. Implement on-chain checks to prevent unauthorized validator actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documented key management policies, MFA implementation, and code review of on-chain validation logic.

checklist_items.title: Validate Delegation Amounts
checklist_items.description: Implement client-side and server-side validation for delegation amounts. Use non-mutable transaction patterns.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no sufficient input validation for delegation amounts.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement client-side and server-side validation for delegation amounts. Use non-mutable transaction patterns.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review of validation logic and verification of non-mutable transaction implementation.

checklist_items.title: Implement Strong Identity Validation for Delegation Transactions
checklist_items.description: Ensure delegation source is cryptographically verified.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no sufficient identity validation for delegation transactions.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong identity validation for delegation transactions. Ensure source is cryptographically verified.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating cryptographic verification of delegation source.

checklist_items.title: Implement Access Control and MFA for Token Manager's Wallet
checklist_items.description: Implement strict access control and multi-factor authentication for the Token Manager's wallet.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Token Manager's wallet is compromised, allowing an attacker to modify the Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict access control and multi-factor authentication for the Token Manager's wallet.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Access control policies and MFA logs.

checklist_items.title: Regularly Audit Incentive Token Contracts for Vulnerabilities
checklist_items.description: Regularly audit Incentive Token contracts for vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Token Manager's wallet is compromised, allowing an attacker to modify the Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Regularly audit Incentive Token contracts for vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports of Incentive Token contracts.

checklist_items.title: Verify Token Manager's Identity
checklist_items.description: Introduce a mechanism to verify the authenticity of the Token Manager's actions.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no proper authentication mechanism to verify the identity of the Token Manager.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication and strong key management practices for the Token Manager's wallet. Introduce a mechanism to verify the authenticity of the Token Manager's actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Documentation of the authentication mechanism and verification process.

checklist_items.title: Implement Governance Mechanism for Token Manager Replacement
checklist_items.description: Implement a governance mechanism to replace a malicious or unavailable Token Manager.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Token Manager is a trusted entity that will always act in the best interest of the system.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Introduce a governance mechanism to replace a malicious or unavailable Token Manager.

checklist_items.title: Implement Input Validation for Governance Proposal Submissions
checklist_items.description: Implement input validation to ensure the content of governance proposals is valid and does not contain malicious code or data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Governance proposals may contain malicious code or data.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement input validation to ensure the content of governance proposals is valid.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review of input validation logic for governance proposals.
